description: check hypothesis-tree invariants and report any inconsistencies (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the tree or run config
checks that the root exists, parents resolve, statuses are valid, and best_node is consistent
exits non-zero inside the core if the tree is invalid (the porter still records the report)
usage: Set RECORD_STORE pointing at an existing Arbor run. Output: validate.txt (prints OK with node count, or INVALID with the problems). If no run exists, an empty bootstrap run is created first.
limitation: Structural invariant check only — it does not repair the tree or judge research quality.
